title: SQL Mission 1: Fetch Only Required Columns

initialState.content:
-- Mission Guidelines:
-- Table: orders(order_id, customer_id, order_date, status, total_amount, notes)
-- Task: Optimize a reporting query by avoiding SELECT *
-- Return only: order_id, customer_id, order_date
-- Filter: status = 'completed'
-- Sort newest first by order_date

SELECT order_id, customer_id, order_date
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'completed'
ORDER BY order_date DESC;
